mapper.select: SELECT id, book_name, author, isbn, publish_house, price, stock, category_id, create_time, update_time FROM dbo.t_book ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, book_name, author, isbn, publish_house, price, stock, category_id, create_time, update_time FROM dbo.t_book WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.t_book (book_name, author, isbn, publish_house, price, stock, category_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{bookName}, #{author}, #{isbn}, #{publishHouse}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{categoryId}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.t_book SET book_name = #{bookName}, author = #{author}, isbn = #{isbn}, publish_house = #{publishHouse}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, category_id = #{categoryId}, update_time = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
